title: Relax Properties
description:
Relax Properties

Relax Properties

The following list is a summary of properties for the Relax object.  The details for each property are explained in the Description field.

Property	Description

Name Property	This property can set a particular name that is assigned to objects.  When Relax object is created, name is assigned automatically.  For the assigned name, number is added after Relax such as Relax01.

You can change the name and up to 32 characters can be specified.  English one byte characters and underscore [ _ ] are available.  Also, you cannot use number for initial character.

Description Property	This property can set explanations for objects.  The explanation can be freely written using up to 255 characters.

Enabled Property	This property can set whether to enable the object.  When specifying True, the program executes the object.  When specifying False, the program executes the next object without executing the object.  Use this property when you want to save the sequence temporary without executing it or try with different parameters by copying objects during sequence creation.

AutoStepID Property	This property can set an automatic assignment of StepID in object execution.  When specifying True, assign StepID automatically.  When specifying False, it will be the value specified by StepID Property.  When assigning automatically, (sequence number *100 + object number) is set.  StepID is recorded to files that the force or the position during the sequence execution is recorded.  It is used to determine which interval corresponds to which object.

StepID Property	This property can set StepID during the object execution.  It is only used when AutoStepID is False.

AbortSeqOnFail Property	This property can set operations when the object fails.  When specifying True, the program ends the sequence and proceeds to the next SPEL statement if the object fails.  When specifying False, the program proceeds to the next force guide object without ending the sequence even if the object fails.  It is used when you want to continue the sequence (ex: the recovery processes are included in the sequence when the object fails.)

IOPreprocessEnabled Property	This property can set I/O operations when the object starts.  When specifying True, the program executes I/O operation.  When specifying False, the program does not execute I/O operation.  I/O operations are defined by IOPreprocOutputBit Property and IOPreprocOutputStatus Property.  It is used when you want to operate the hands or peripherals before the object execution.

IOPreprocessOutputBit Property	This property can set I/O operations (output bit) when the object starts.  It is only used when IOPreprocEnabled is True.

Fx_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Fx direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Fx direction since the force control functions to Fx direction are not executed.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Fx direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external force will be 0.  Therefore, when the external force is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Fx_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Fx direction during the operation of Relax object.  It is used when Fx_ControlMode is Follow.  When Fx_Firmness increases, the force control function to Fx direction will be strong.  Response to changes of the force is slow, however, oscillation does not occur. When Fx_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Fx direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the force is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Fy_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Fy direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Fy direction since the force control functions to Fy direction are not executed.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Fy direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external force will be 0.  Therefore, when the external force is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Fy_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Fy direction during the operation of Relax object.  It is used when Fy_ControlMode is Follow.  When Fy_Firmness increases, the force control function to Fy direction will be strong.  Response to changes of the force is slow, however, oscillation does not occur. When Fy_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Fy direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the force is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Fz_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Fz direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Fz direction since the force control functions to Fz direction are not executed.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Fz direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external force will be 0.  Therefore, when the external force is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Fz_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Fz direction during the operation of Relax object.  It is used when Fz_ControlMode is Follow.  When Fz_Firmness increases, the force control function to Fz direction will be strong.  Response to changes of the force is slow, however, oscillation does not occur. When Fz_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Fz direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the force is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Tx_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Tx direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Tx direction since the force control functions to Tx direction are not executed.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Tx direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external torque will be 0.  Therefore, when the external torque is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Tx_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Tx direction during the operation of Relax object.  It is used when Tx_ControlMode is Follow.  When Tx_Firmness increases, the force control function to Tx direction will be strong.  Response to changes in the torque is slow, however, oscillation does not occur.  When Tx_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Tx direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the torque is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Ty_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Ty direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Ty direction since the force control functions to Ty direction are not executed.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Ty direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external torque will be 0.  Therefore, when the external torque is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Ty_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Ty direction during the operation of Relax object.  It is used when Ty_ControlMode is Follow.  When Ty_Firmness increases, the force control function to Ty direction will be strong.  Response to changes in the torque is slow, however, oscillation does not occur. When Ty_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Ty direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the torque is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Tz_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Tz direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Tz direction since the force control functions to Tz direction are not executed.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Tz direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external torque will be 0.  Therefore, when the external torque is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Tz_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Tz direction during the operation of Relax object.  It is used when Tz_ControlMode is Follow.  When Tz_Firmness increases, the force control function to Tz direction will be strong.  Response to changes in the torque is slow, however, oscillation does not occur. When Tz_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Tz direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the torque is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

CFEnabled Property	This property set whether to continue the force control functions after the objects are ended.  When specifying True, the force control functions will continue even if the objects are ended.  When specifying False, the force control functions will end when the objects are ended.  When the sequence ends even if CFEnabled is True, the force control functions will end.

EndCheckOperator Property	This property can set the combination conditions when using multiple end conditions of the object.  When specifying AND, if all of the enabled end conditions are satisfied, the program ends the object execution.  The program determines as succeeded and proceeds to the next force guide object.  When specifying OR, if one or more of the enabled end conditions are satisfied, the program ends the object execution.  The program determines as succeeded and proceeds to the next force guide object.

ForceCheckEnabled Property	This property can set the end conditions of the object related to force.  When specifying True, the end conditions related to force are enabled.  When specifying False, the end conditions related to force are disabled.

FollowCheckTolF Property	This property can set the range of the end conditions related to force.  It is used when ForceCheckEnabld is True.  For Fx, Fy, and Fz, it is used in axis that specified Follow in each ControlMode and determined that it is within the range of -FollowCheckTolF to + FollowCheckTolF.  If all axes specified Follow are within the range set by either FollowCheckTolF or ContactTorqueThresh, it is determined as the end conditions are satisfied.

FollowCheckTolT Property	This property can set the range of the end conditions related to force.  It is used when ForceCheckEnabld is True.  For Tx, Ty, and Tz, it is used in axis that specified Follow in each ControlMode and determined that it is within the range of -FollowCheckTolT to + FollowCheckTolT.  If all axes specified Follow are within the range set by either FollowCheckTolF or ContactTorqueThresh, it is determined as the end conditions are satisfied.

HoldTimeThresh Property	This property can set the duration time until the determination of the end conditions related to force.  It is used when ForceCheckEnabld is True.  If the state within the range specified by either FollowCheckTolF or FollowCheckTolT continues for the time specified by HoldTimeThresh, the program determines that the end conditions are satisfied.

IOCheckEnabled Property	This property can set the end conditions of the object related to I/O.  When specifying True, the end conditions related to I/O is enabled.  When specifying False, the end conditions related to I/O is disabled.

IOCheckInputBit Property	This property can set the bit of determination target of the end conditions related to I/O.  It is used when IOCheckEnabled is True.

IOCheckInputStatus Property	This property can set the end conditions of the end conditions related to I/O.  It is used when IOCheckEnabled is True.

On: If the bit specified by IOCheckInputBit is On (1), determine that the end conditions are satisfied.

Off: If the bit specified byIOCheckInputBit is Off (0), determine that the end conditions are satisfied.
